diff.content:
diff --git a/profile.py b/profile.py
--- a/profile.py
+++ b/profile.py
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
 def display_name(user):
-    return user.name
+    if user.preferred_name:
+        return user.preferred_name
+    return user.name

change_contract.goal: Display a preferred name when one is present.
acceptance_criteria: The existing name remains the fallback.
preserved_behaviors: Users without a preferred name display their existing name.

validation.name: profile tests
validation.result: 4 passed including preferred and fallback names
